series_metadata.series_title: Accounts Payable/Receivable, Administrative Invoices, and General Ledger
series_metadata.series_description: Records generated in relation to accounts payable/receivable, invoices and general ledger.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for seven (7) state fiscal years and then destroy. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. All records and information pertaining to this schedule is now stored in OAKS or by Shared Services. This schedule is for old records generated prior to OAKS and will eventually become obsolete once all old records are destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain for seven (7) state fiscal years and then destroy. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. All records and information pertaining to this schedule is now stored in OAKS or by Shared Services. This schedule is for old records generated prior to OAKS and will eventually become obsolete once all old records are destroyed., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
